programme.title: Fun2shh... Dudes in the 10th Century
programme.desc: Three men Vikram, Ajay and John D'Souza are accused of stealing the crown of Emperor Babushah and, whilst on the run, they are transported back to the 10th century. Now they must not only prove their innocence but also return to the 21st century.

programme.title: Fun2shh... Dudes in the 10th Century
programme.desc: Three men Vikram, Ajay and John D'Souza are accused of stealing the crown of Emperor Babushah and, whilst on the run, they are transported back to the 10th century. Now they must not only prove their innocence but also return to the 21st century.

programme.title: Fun2shh... Dudes in the 10th Century
programme.desc: Three men Vikram, Ajay and John D'Souza are accused of stealing the crown of Emperor Babushah and, whilst on the run, they are transported back to the 10th century. Now they must not only prove their innocence but also return to the 21st century.

programme.title: Benaam
programme.desc: Amit, a married man, gets trouble upon saving a stabbed journalist. Thereafter, he starts receiving anonymous threats. Trouble starts mounting when Amit's son gets kidnapped and the only way to protect his family is to find this criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Benaam
programme.desc: Amit, a married man, gets trouble upon saving a stabbed journalist. Thereafter, he starts receiving anonymous threats. Trouble starts mounting when Amit's son gets kidnapped and the only way to protect his family is to find this criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Benaam
programme.desc: Amit, a married man, gets trouble upon saving a stabbed journalist. Thereafter, he starts receiving anonymous threats. Trouble starts mounting when Amit's son gets kidnapped and the only way to protect his family is to find this criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Benaam
programme.desc: Amit, a married man, gets trouble upon saving a stabbed journalist. Thereafter, he starts receiving anonymous threats. Trouble starts mounting when Amit's son gets kidnapped and the only way to protect his family is to find this criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Avtaar
programme.desc: A retired car mechanic, Avtaar and his wife are swindled out of their own house by their sons, who leave them to fend for themselves. Avtaar then decides to rebuild himself a highly successful business with staunch support from his wife and a loyal servant , Sewak.

programme.title: Avtaar
programme.desc: A retired car mechanic, Avtaar and his wife are swindled out of their own house by their sons, who leave them to fend for themselves. Avtaar then decides to rebuild himself a highly successful business with staunch support from his wife and a loyal servant , Sewak.

programme.title: Avtaar
programme.desc: A retired car mechanic, Avtaar and his wife are swindled out of their own house by their sons, who leave them to fend for themselves. Avtaar then decides to rebuild himself a highly successful business with staunch support from his wife and a loyal servant , Sewak.

programme.title: Avtaar
programme.desc: A retired car mechanic, Avtaar and his wife are swindled out of their own house by their sons, who leave them to fend for themselves. Avtaar then decides to rebuild himself a highly successful business with staunch support from his wife and a loyal servant , Sewak.

programme.title: Amar Akbar Anthony
programme.desc: A family of five is separated in an unfortunate incident. The three brothers are raised in different religious households. As fate would have it, the family reunites after several years and avenges those responsible for their separation.

programme.title: Amar Akbar Anthony
programme.desc: A family of five is separated in an unfortunate incident. The three brothers are raised in different religious households. As fate would have it, the family reunites after several years and avenges those responsible for their separation.

programme.desc: A family of five is separated in an unfortunate incident. The three brothers are raised in different religious households. As fate would have it, the family reunites after several years and avenges those responsible for their separation.

programme.title: Amar Akbar Anthony
programme.desc: A family of five is separated in an unfortunate incident. The three brothers are raised in different religious households. As fate would have it, the family reunites after several years and avenges those responsible for their separation.

programme.title: Golmaal Returns
programme.desc: Gopal’s life hits choppy waters when he gets stuck on a yacht for a night upon rescuing an attractive young woman by fighting off some goons. Now, he has his wife suspecting him of having an affair and a police officer on his tail.

programme.title: Golmaal Returns
programme.desc: Gopal’s life hits choppy waters when he gets stuck on a yacht for a night upon rescuing an attractive young woman by fighting off some goons. Now, he has his wife suspecting him of having an affair and a police officer on his tail.
